title: Purged rolling-origin CV with race-order embargo for model selection
summary: Current grouped folds avoid within-race leakage, but they still let future races/years inform validation choices.
rationale: Current grouped folds avoid within-race leakage, but they still let future races/years inform validation choices. Recent leakage literature on clustered data and standard calibration guidance both imply that unbiased OOF estimates matter when rows are dependent. For this task, a small temporal embargo around held-out races should better reflect deployment and may change which feature sets actually generalize.
implementation_hint: Order races by Year then calendar order within year. Validate with forward-chaining splits, holding out contiguous race blocks and embargoing adjacent races or a few laps of neighboring events from training. Re-run only model/feature selection under this CV; keep the existing train-all fit logic unchanged.
expected_effect: Lower but more trustworthy local CV, with better correlation between CV and leaderboard movement; may rescue ideas that looked neutral under StratifiedGroupKFold.
risk: If the test set is not truly forward-shifted in time, stricter CV can understate achievable score and slow iteration.
